name: Southern Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Add the egg and milk; mix well.
3. Pour into a 12 x 8-inch pan sprayed with nonstick vegetable coating.
4. Bake at 425°F for 25 minutes.
5. Cut into 12 squares.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 81; fat 1g, cholesterol 0, carbohydrate 15g, sodium 142mg.
Exchanges: Bread 1
